_comment: STAGING-ONLY ground truth for the M7 window. Consumed by cmd/staged-range -ground-truth-registry to auto-label canary-touch verdicts: the legit generator identities are confirmed-benign, the prober identity is confirmed-malicious. These are REAL confirmations of an environment we built, fed through the same feedback seam an analyst uses (see internal/intelligence/stagedlabel). This file must never reach a production engine — cmd/engine cannot even import the labeler. The legit list mirrors the simdriver's benign callers (deploy/m7-window/sim-setup.sh SIM_BENIGN_IPS); .104 (careful-mover deviant) and .112 (recon scanner) are intentionally absent so they are NOT auto-labeled benign.
